design_philosophy.core_loop: Avoid arrest by Popper Police, manage currency (nickels), navigate environments to arrange a date with Holli Would and reach her apartment
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Legal consequence system: breaking the law accumulates wanted status; bail payments required; risk of forced arrest interrupting progression
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Navigate a cartoon world inspired by the Cool World film, managing social standing and currency to achieve romantic objective
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Adventure-hybrid platformer with consequence-based gameplay loop (arrest/bail system) rather than pure action progression; emphasizes consequence over combat, currency management over combat prowess

difficulty.continues_system: Arrest/bail system: player accumulates wanted level through law-breaking; Detective Frank Harris lectures or demands bail (typically 10 coins) upon arrest
difficulty.checkpointing: Vertical progression within environments (e.g., Holli's apartment requires reaching top floor without prior date arrangement or player is reset to ground level)
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Player controls law-breaking frequency and resource management; can mitigate consequences by collecting nickels and paying bail before arrest escalates

progression.upgrade_system: Nickel currency collection enables: pawn shop item trades, bail payments, candy collection to unlock malt shop access, date arrangement at Slash Club
progression.unlock_mechanism: Gated progression based on: currency thresholds (entry fees to malt shop), date arrangement prerequisite (access to Holli's apartment), law-abiding status (arrest prevents forward movement)
replayability_hooks: Multiple locales to explore (Las Vegas, pawn shop, Slash Club, Cool World bank, malt shop, Holli's apartment)
Consequence system creates variable routing based on player law-breaking choices

world_building_techniques: Character-driven progression (Detective Frank Harris lectures on arrest)
Location-based world (Las Vegas, Slash Club, apartment building)
Currency narrative framing (nickel economy, bail system)
NPC interactions (Holli Would dating mechanic, Popper Police enforcement)

faction_indicators: Detective Frank Harris (authority figure, consequence deliverer)
danger_signals: Bail debt system creating resource scarcity
Popper Police patrols in hub environments

sources_used: Wikipedia - Cool World (SNES video game): Gameplay section, game overview, character descriptions, mechanic details
The Cutting Room Floor - Cool World (SNES): Developer and publisher information, release dates
